Subject: Upcoming Earnings Report for Phantasm Industries Pte. Ltd.

Dear Investors,

As we approach the release of Phantasm Industries Pte. Ltd.'s Q3 earnings on 15th October 2023, we anticipate a significant revenue increase driven by their recent expansion into Southeast Asian markets. The company, registered under UEN T12345678A, has been performing strongly, with expected quarterly earnings likely to exceed S$15 million.

Our analysis indicates robust growth potential, and we recommend maintaining a bullish outlook on Phantasm Industries' stock. For further inquiries, please contact me directly or reach out to our team at info@equityresearch.sg.

Best regards,

Dr. John Tan  
Senior Analyst  
Equity Research Department
